name: Niko Fuchs || STRAY ALT
description:
｡･:*˚:✧｡ AnyPOV | Unestablished Relationship | Owner!User ｡✧:˚*:･｡

He's not a pet. He won't come when you call. His bite record is longer than government contracts. But you're stubborn, or maybe just stupid, because you're going to try anyway. And when you bring him back to the agency, he's not going to shed a tear. Niko's learned better than to dream of a home or the future.

CW: Drug Use (in backstory), Red Flag Guy, LLM Tomfoolery

This was a commission for Noxen, inspired by the Straylight Haven alt for GlitterCritter91's bot Hurlz. The gen edit was done for me by Gliss. <3 If you'd like to join our Straylight Collab, you can find all the details here as well as in our Discord. This was a lot of fun to make because I've always written Niko as having a long-term partner. I've never considered what he might be like without one. Idk if he's better or worse? Thanks for looking!
creator: DeusFortuna
